problem_solved: Lack of structured oncology data for clinical trials and real-world evidence
solution_description: Oncology-specific EHR platform and real-world evidence data network. Curates structured data from cancer centers for research. Acquired by Roche in 2018.
notes: Gold standard for oncology real-world evidence. Data used for FDA submissions. Competes with Cota Healthcare, ConcertAI in oncology analytics.
